title: Scalar function without input parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 AS SELECT id, IFNULL(value, 0) AS value FROM test_table_1;
SELECT id, RAND() AS random_value FROM test_table_2 WHERE value > 0;
key_bug_features: Scalar function caching results despite being marked volatile
